title: UBC Abacus Dataverse DataFile
description: A single file belonging to a dataset in UBC Library's Abacus Dataverse repository. Field set derived from the live OpenAPI DataFile schema.

id.description: Internal numeric database id of the file.

contentType.description: MIME content type of the file.

filesize.description: Size of the file in bytes.

checksumType.description: Checksum algorithm, e.g. MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256.

checksumValue.description: Computed checksum value for integrity verification.
